user.title: Connect to First Alert by Resideo
user.description:
Choose how you want to authenticate with your Resideo account.

See the [documentation]({docs_url}) for more information.

manual.title: Manual Token Entry
manual.description:
Enter your refresh token to connect your First Alert smoke detectors.

See the [documentation]({docs_url}) for instructions on how to obtain your refresh token.

data_description.refresh_token: The refresh token obtained from the Resideo API

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your authentication has expired. Please choose how to reauthenticate.

reauth_manual.title: Reauthenticate with Token
reauth_manual.description: Enter a new refresh token to restore your connection.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication - please check your refresh token
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Resideo API

abort.no_refresh_token: No refresh token received from OAuth

application_credentials.description:
Follow the [instructions]({more_info_url}) to configure Resideo OAuth credentials.

Note: OAuth requires the Resideo client ID. You can use the built-in client ID or provide your own.
